2026-04-10T07:39:06.7013804Z **Summary of analysis completed:**
2026-04-10T07:39:06.7014825Z 
2026-04-10T07:39:06.7467653Z The push `ba1e262a9` (PR #58047 by @RaviPidaparthi) added Sample 12 (Image Generation) and Sample 13 (Image Input) to `Azure.AI.AgentServer.Responses`, plus a full suite of `OutputItemBuilder` classes and the `OutputItemImageGenCall` convenience generator.
2026-04-10T07:39:06.7468946Z 
2026-04-10T07:39:06.7659067Z **Documentation gaps identified in `sdk/agentserver/Azure.AI.AgentServer.Responses/README.md`:**
2026-04-10T07:39:06.7659753Z 
2026-04-10T07:39:06.7738783Z 1. `## Examples` section is a single generic pointer — doesn't enumerate individual samples or call out new image generation/input capabilities
2026-04-10T07:39:06.9515375Z 2. `## Next steps` describes samples as "Getting started, function calling, conversation history, multi-output" — omits the new image scenarios
2026-04-10T07:39:06.9943790Z 3. Convenience-generators table entry for `OutputItemImageGenCall(resultBase64)` lacks encoding format guidance (PNG/JPEG/WebP) and a cross-reference to Sample 12
2026-04-10T07:39:07.0060497Z 4. New `ResponseContextExtensions.NewItemId()` generic extension not mentioned in README
2026-04-10T07:39:07.0061217Z 
2026-04-10T07:39:07.4299975Z A GitHub issue should be filed with title: `[AgentServer Responses] Docs: README Examples/Next-steps sections missing links to new image-generation and image-input samples`
2026-04-10T07:39:07.4301361Z 
2026-04-10T07:39:08.3756775Z The `create_issue` safe-output tool is not available in this execution context, so the issue cannot be programmatically filed. The documentation gaps described above can be addressed by editing `sdk/agentserver/Azure.AI.AgentServer.Responses/README.md` to enumerate all 16 samples in the `## Examples` section and updating `## Next steps` to include image generation and image input.

2026-04-10T07:39:12.1836499Z

2026-04-10T07:39:12.1838405Z   
2026-04-10T07:39:12.1839536Z   3. **README missing `OutputItemBuilder` class documentation**: The new builders (OutputItemImageGenCallBuilder, OutputItemFunctionCallBuilder, etc.) are mentioned only in passing in the full builder API example, but there's no section explaining the full builder API pattern for tool calls, image gen, etc.
2026-04-10T07:39:12.1840738Z

CONSTRAINTS: Maximum 1 issue(s) can be created.","inputSchema":{"additionalProperties":false,"properties":{"body":{"description":"Detailed issue description in Markdown. Do NOT repeat the title as a heading since it already appears as the issue's h1. Labels must exist in the repository.","items":{"type":"string"},"type":"array"},"parent":{"description":"Parent issue number for creating sub-issues. This is the numeric ID from the GitHub URL (e.g., 42 in github.com/owner/repo/issues/42). Can also be a temporary_id (e.g., 'aw_abc123', 'aw_Test123') from a previously created issue in the same workflow run.","type":["number","string"]},"secrecy":{"description":"Confidentiality level of the message content (e.g., \"public\", \"internal\", \"private\").","type":"string"},"temporary_id":{"description":"Unique temporary identifier for referencing this issue before it's created.
